probe_method: Load models sequentially, inspect /api/ps after each. Verify model name, size_vram, context_length, expires_at fields present and accurate.

probes.note: Nemotron (3.05GB) evicted when Qwen (6.43GB) loaded. Combined 9.48GB exceeds 8GB VRAM.
Qwen evicted when Llama loaded. Nemotron reappeared — possible VRAM caching/partial offload behavior. Llama (2.75GB) + Nemotron (3.05GB) = 5.8GB fits in 8GB VRAM.

evidence_summary: /api/ps accurately reports loaded models with all required fields (name, size_vram, context_length, expires_at). Reports are consistent with observed VRAM behavior. Nemotron reappearance after Qwen eviction is surprising but not incorrect — Ollama may cache models in system RAM and restore when VRAM becomes available.
